ref: If that happens, the master will surely come on a day and at a time when the servant least expects him.
text: ne wura he bɛba da korɔ a n’ani nna so ne dɔnhwere a onnim mu.
translated: The person who comes to the world does not know what will happen to him/her tomorrow.

ref: Although it is the smallest of all seeds, it grows larger than any garden plant and becomes a tree. Birds even come and nest on its branches.
text: ɔyɛ ketewa paa aba nyinaa mu deɛ, nso sɛ onyini a, ɔbɛyɛ wuraa nyinaa mu kɛseɛ na ɔbɛyɛ dua kɛseɛ ma nnomaa a bɛya wiem bɛyɛ bɛ buo ne mmane so.” Mmɔreka ho mfantoho
translated: Even though he is a small boy, he will be the greatest of all kings, and he will be a very tall tree for the women who will come to give birth to their children under its shade.

ref: Don't condemn others, and God won't condemn you.
text: Hommmu atɛne, na bɛammu ho atɛne.
translated: They are all the same, they are all the same.

ref: When the plants came up and began to mature, the farmer's servants could see the weeds.
text: Afei berɛ a ofifiriiɛ a na ɔɔso aba he, saa berɛ heaa ne wuraa he nso fifiriiɛ.
translated: At the time that the one who is being chased runs, the one who is chasing also runs.

ref: The men in the boat worshiped Jesus and said, “You really are the Son of God!” Jesus Heals Sick People in Gennesaret (Mark
text: Na bɛ a bɛ ya kodoɔ he mu he koto sɔree Yesu, kaa sɛ, “Ampa, wo ne Nyankopɔn Ba he.” Yesu saa yadeɛ Genesaret
translated: Yes, they came to him and said, "Truly, you are the Son of God." Then Jesus knew that they had come to him and said, "Truly, you are the Son of God." Then Jesus knew that they had come to him.
